시편 62:1.content: My soul rests in God alone. My salvation is from him.

시편 62:2.content: He alone is my rock, my salvation, and my fortress. I will never be greatly shaken.

시편 62:3.content: How long will you assault a man? Would all of you throw him down, like a leaning wall, like a tottering fence?

시편 62:4.content: They fully intend to throw him down from his lofty place. They delight in lies. They bless with their mouth, but they curse inwardly.

시편 62:5.content: My soul, wait in silence for God alone, for my expectation is from him.

시편 62:6.content: He alone is my rock and my salvation, my fortress. I will not be shaken.

시편 62:7.content: My salvation and my honor is with God. The rock of my strength, and my refuge, is in God.

시편 62:8.content: Trust in him at all times, you people. Pour out your heart before him. God is a refuge for us.

시편 62:9.content: Surely men of low degree are just a breath, and men of high degree are a lie. In the balances they will go up. They are together lighter than a breath.

시편 62:10.content: Don’t trust in oppression. Don’t become vain in robbery. If riches increase, don’t set your heart on them.

시편 62:11.content: God has spoken once; twice I have heard this, that power belongs to God.

시편 62:12.content: Also to you, Lord, belongs loving kindness, for you reward every man according to his work.
